(d) Let us check all options one by one.
From option (a),
17 - 3 × 6 = 45
⇒ 17 × 3 ÷ 6 = 45 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 51 ÷ 39 ⇒ LHS ≠ RHS
So, option (a) is incorrect.
From option (b),
17 - 3 × 6 = 45
⇒ 17 - 3 × 6 = 45 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 17 - 18 = 45 ⇒ -1 = 45
∴ LHS ≠ RHS
So, option (b) is incorrect.
From option (c),
17 - 3 × 6 = 45
⇒ 17 = 3 × 6 = 45 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 17 = 18 - 45 ⇒ 17 = -27
∴ LHS ≠ RHS
So, option (c) is incorrect.
From option (d),
17 - 3 × 6 = 45
⇒ 17 × 3 ÷ 6 = 45 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 51 ÷ 6 = 45 ⇒ 45 = 45
∴ LHS = RHS
So, option (d) is correct.

(d) Let us check all the options one-by-one.
From option (a), 3 + 2 × 1 = 7
⇒ 3 × 2 + 1 = 7 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 6 + 1 = 7 ⇒ 7 = 7
∴ LHS = RHS
As option (a) gives us correct answer, there is no need to check remaining options.

(b) Let us check all the options one by one.
From option (a),
6 - 5 + 4 = 34 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 10 - 5 = 34 ⇒ 5 = 34
∴ LHS ≠ RHS
So, option (a) is incorrect.
From option (b),
6 × 5 + 4 = 34 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 30 + 4 = 34 ⇒ 34 = 34
⇒ LHS = RHS
So, option (b) gives us the correct answer and hence, there is no need to check remaining options.

(c) Let us check all the options one-by-one.
From option (a),
7 - 4 × 8 × 2 = 24 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 7 - 64 = 24 ⇒ -57 = 24
∴ LHS ≠ RHS
So, option (a) is incorrect.
From option (b),
7 - 4 × 8 ÷ 2 = 24 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 7 - 4 × 4 = 24 ⇒ 7 - 16 = 24
⇒ -9 = 24 ⇒ LHS ≠ RHS
So, option (b) is incorrect.
From option (c),
7 × 4 - 8 ÷ 2 = 24 (using VBODMAS rule)
⇒ 7 × 4 - 4 = 24 ⇒ 28 - 4 = 24
⇒ 24 = 24 ⇒ LHS = RHS
So, option (c) is correct and hence, there is no need to check option (d).

(c) Let us check all the options one by one.
From option (a),
65 - 40 + 11 = 36 ⇒ 76 - 40 = 36
⇒ 36 = 36 ⇒ LHS = RHS
So, option (a) is correct and hence there is no need to check remaining options.

(b) Given, 7 + 7 + 2 • 1 = 12
Let us check all the options one by one.
From option (a), putting the signs in given equation, we get
7 × 7 - 2 + 1 = 12 ⇒ 7 × 7 - 2 = 12
⇒ 49 - 2 = 12 ⇒ 47 = 12
⇒ LHS ≠ RHS
So, option (a) is incorrect.
From option (b), putting the signs in given equation, we get
7 + 7 - 2 × 1 = 12 ⇒ 7 + 7 - 2 = 12
⇒ 14 - 2 = 12 ⇒ 12 = 12
Hence, option (b) is correct and there is no need to check remaining options.

(b) 1 ? K K K = 24
According to the question,
? + ? + 4 + 4 + 4 = 24
⇒ ? = 24 - 19 = 5 = O
Hence, O is the missing symbol in the block.

(c) Given equation, (16 - 4) × 6 ÷ 2 + 8 = 30
Let us check all the options one by one.
From option (a), after interchanging signs, we get
(16 + 4) × 6 - 2 + 8 = 30 ⇒ 4 × 6 - 2 + 8 = 30
⇒ 24 - 2 + 8 = 30 ⇒ 32 - 2 = 30
⇒ 30 = 30
So, option (a) is correct and there is no need to check remaining options.
